calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2005 Continued To Jan-17-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/17/2006 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Anthony Vaughn (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-25-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Oct-17-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR# 11288 (212)

Off Calendar Jun-21-2005 Denied
